---
title: "Mrs Jewell"
---

## Mrs Jewell

### Description

inhabitant of Otterbourne, her husband invalid or workshy

### Biography

Perhaps Mary Jewell (b. 1852/3) wife of William Jewell, of Otterbourne, labourer, and mother of Rose (b.1877/8) and Percy (b. 1879/80).  She may also be the Mrs Jewell who was one of CMY’s tenants in 1896.  Probably the same Mrs Jewell was working for Miss Finlaison in 1901.

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 26th  [1901]
- Letter from Jan 29 1896
- Letter from Jany 27th [?1883]
- Letter from April 19th [mid 1880s?]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
